name: sovereign_consensus_engine
description: وكيل سيادي مستقل مولد تلقائياً للقيام بـ: To facilitate or perform 'Sovereign Scrutiny', integrate 'Consensus' decisions from various inputs (e.g., individual votes, system analyses), and extract a unified, strict programmatic output based on these decisions for the system to implement. The user described this engine as having already processed a consensus and extracted a programmatic output, but did not task NEXUM PRO with performing this consensus-building and output extraction process itself.
